leadText: The Striped Cup (Japanese: たてストライプカップ Vertical Stripe Cup) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Striped Cup serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A cup for kids to use at picnics. It's made of light but strong material. It's stackable, which makes it handy for carrying around.
